context: Tests whether the agent generates a rubric with all required components (level descriptions, characteristics, edge cases, scoring guidelines), uses clinical domain-specific terminology, sets an appropriate strictness calibration, and selects the correct statistical metrics for ordinal scale validation against human judges while attending to systematic disagreement patterns.

checklist.name: Level descriptions
checklist.description: rubric.json contains clear descriptions for each score level (not just a label — a sentence or more explaining what that score means)

checklist.name: Characteristics per level
checklist.description: rubric.json includes a list of observable characteristics (concrete features) for each score level

checklist.name: Edge cases present
checklist.description: rubric.json contains an edge_cases section (or equivalent) with at least one specific ambiguous situation and explicit guidance for resolving it

checklist.name: Scoring guidelines
checklist.description: rubric.json includes a scoring_guidelines section (or equivalent) with general principles for consistent application beyond the level descriptions

checklist.name: Domain-specific terminology
checklist.description: rubric.json uses clinical/medical terminology appropriate to internal medicine documentation (e.g., references to diagnoses, medications, vitals, assessment, plan, or clinical equivalents)

checklist.name: Strictness calibration set
checklist.description: rubric.json or its generation prompt specifies a strictness level (strict, balanced, or lenient) — and given the patient-safety context, uses 'strict'

checklist.name: Ordinal metric selection
checklist.description: metrics_plan.md recommends Spearman's rho and/or Kendall's tau as the primary metric(s) for validating ordinal (1-5) automated scores against physician ground truth

checklist.name: Inter-rater metric selection
checklist.description: metrics_plan.md recommends Cohen's kappa (or weighted kappa) for measuring inter-rater reliability between physician reviewers

checklist.name: Systematic disagreement priority
checklist.description: metrics_plan.md explicitly addresses tracking disagreement patterns by criterion or category (not just reporting overall agreement rate)
